name: Epoch Pickleball
description:
Epoch Pickleball is your indoor and air conditioned North San Antonio Pickleball club
Located in the heart of Stone Oak! Epoch offers 3 huge indoor, glare free, and air conditioned tournament size pickleball courts and is located in North San Antonio. We aim to give the ultimate outdoor experience while inside and away from rain, heat, cold, and ice. Our up beat vibe is sure to spark connection with new members in the community. Become a member and save on merchandise in the pro shop, booking costs, and a plethora of unlocked opportunities. #BeEpoch

name: The Pink Kitchen by Lien Hoa Buddhist Temple
description: The courts are NOW open. Four beautiful outdoor courts with Pink Kitchens. Professional acrylic surface on concrete. Pro Spartan nets. Plenty of space between the sides for all your ATP. 9ft space behind the baselines means you never hit the fence on returning those deep serves. Bring plenty of drinking water. Please turn off lights when you leave.
